name: Sarah Chen
bio: Met during freshman year at university. We bonded over late-night study sessions and terrible dining hall food. She is now a UX designer in San Francisco.

name: Marcus Johnson
bio: My first manager at my internship. Taught me that good code is written for humans first. Still meets me for coffee every month to talk about career growth.

name: Aisha Patel
bio: My cousin who grew up in the same neighborhood. We used to build pillow forts every weekend. Now she is studying medicine in London and we rarely get to talk.

name: Ryan O'Brien
bio: Met Ryan on a backpacking trip through Southeast Asia. He's the kind of person who always knows the best hidden gem restaurants in any city. We plan a trip together every year.

name: Olivia Martinez
bio: Olivia and I worked on the same product team for two years. She has a rare talent for turning complicated problems into elegant solutions. Now she leads design at a startup.

name: Tom Baker
bio: Tom was my next-door neighbor for six years. We spent countless evenings on the porch talking about everything from politics to pizza toppings. He moved across the country last year.

name: Priya Nair
bio: Priya runs the book club I joined two years ago. Her reading recommendations have genuinely changed how I see the world. We also share a love for strong filter coffee.

name: Daniel Park
bio: Daniel and I were gym partners throughout college. He pushed me to run my first 10K. He now coaches youth athletics and is incredibly inspiring to be around.
